name: Chult
summary: A hot, ancient jungle peninsula of dinosaurs, ruins, poisonous plants, undead, hidden gods, merchant wealth and old magic.
politics: Port Nyanzaru is dominated by merchant princes and wealthy interests.
Remote jungle regions are controlled by survival, tribal knowledge, monsters, undead and whoever can hold territory.
Foreign powers such as the Flaming Fist exploit charters, supplies and military pressure.
culture: Guides, hunters, traders and explorers are common near settlements.
Jungle travel is dangerous and often requires local knowledge.
Dinosaurs are beasts of burden, racing animals, predators and living symbols of Chult.
Ancient ruins are treated with caution, fear, reverence or greed depending on who is speaking.
